Climb higher, every week.

Beginner Bouldering Session

A guided 90-minute bouldering session for first-time climbers. All gear provided; no experience required.

Drop-in price: $24 per person.

Runs every Tuesday and Thursday evening, 6:00pm–7:30pm, in the main bouldering cave.

  • Shoes & chalk included
  • Small groups (max 8 climbers)
  • Certified instructors
